title: Tomorrow's Class Reminder
summary: Check tomorrow's classes and prepare a short reminder with what to bring and read.
trigger: Runs each evening, or when you ask Leda to prepare for tomorrow.
steps: Read tomorrow's class schedule from your connected calendar.
Group classes and note any materials or readings you saved.
Draft a short reminder summary for the morning.
Show the draft so you can review before it is saved or sent.
permissions: Read selected calendar entries you connect.
Create a workflow draft you can review.
Does not send anything without your confirmation.

title: Study Plan Builder
summary: Turn a list of topics and a deadline into a realistic, reviewable study plan.
trigger: Runs when you describe what you need to study and by when.
steps: Collect the topics and target date you provide.
Break topics into sessions across the available days.
Balance harder topics earlier and add review sessions.
Present the plan for you to adjust before saving.
permissions: Read the topics and dates you type in.
Create a workflow draft you can edit.
Does not access unrelated files by default.

title: Note Summarizer
summary: Condense long notes into clear key points and action items.
trigger: Runs when you paste or select notes and ask for a summary.
steps: Read the notes text you provide.
Identify key points, decisions, and action items.
Produce a short structured summary.
Show the result for you to keep or refine.
permissions: Returns a summary you can review.
Does not store or upload your notes.

title: Email Draft Helper
summary: Draft a clearer, friendlier email from a few bullet points.
trigger: Runs when you describe the email you want to write.
steps: Read the points and tone you describe.
Draft a structured email with subject and body.
Offer a couple of tone variations.
Show the draft — sending stays in your hands.
permissions: Never sends email on its own.

title: Verified WhatsApp Message
summary: Prepare a message for a contact and confirm before anything is sent.
trigger: Runs when you ask Leda to prepare a message for a chosen contact.
steps: Read the recipient and message intent you provide.
Draft the message text for that contact.
Show a clear confirmation step with the final text.
Send only after you explicitly approve.
permissions: Draft a message for a contact you choose.
Experimental — under active development and not yet available.

title: Weekly Productivity Review
summary: Pull together the week's tasks and notes into a short review.
trigger: Runs weekly, or when you ask for a recap of the week.
steps: Gather tasks and notes from the tools you connect.
Summarize what was completed and what is pending.
Highlight a few suggested priorities for next week.
Present the review for you to edit and keep.
permissions: Read entries from tools you explicitly connect.
Create a review draft you can edit.
Does not change or delete any data.
